headline: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 tops the open weights field as agent tooling and evaluation techniques break out across the window.
body: Z.ai released GLM-5.2, a 753B parameter text-only open weights model using mixture of experts with a 1 million token context window, ranking first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index and second on Code Arena WebDev. Agent and productivity tooling led the rotation, with subagents, text-to-CAD, slide generation, and AI tutor all sitting at peak momentum, while LLM-as-a-judge, continual pretraining, and static scheduling broke out among techniques. On the security side, zero-trust held a leading position and sandboxed iframe and same-origin policy entered as new technique entrants. Talent and governance moved too: Noam Shazeer joined OpenAI, Meta's head of product for 'AI for work' is departing, and Anthropic's curbs in India ignited debate over the pace of national AI governance.

cited_items.title: Meta head of product for 'AI for work' transformation is leaving company

GLM-5.2 is probably the most powerful text-only open weights LLM
